title: Immortality.
content:
Dreadest thou the aspect of death! Thou wishest to live on forever?
    Live in the whole, and when long thou shalt have gone, 'twill remain!
meaning:
"Immortality." is a quintessential example of Friedrich Schiller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
